title: LibAnalog
description: A library bringing pressure-aware keybindings for analog keyboards to Minecraft.
body:
# LibAnalog
Analog keyboards allow registering varying levels of pressure for each key instead of the default pressed/released states. This mod provides a base for other mods relying on pressure-sensitive key inputs by replacing the default Minecraft keybindings.

## Supported Devices
This library aims to support many different analog keyboards, although currently support is limited to:
- Wooting 60HE
- Wooting 80HE
